name: GOLFTEC Cool Springs
about: GOLFTEC is a golf instruction and club fitting facility that uses data-driven technology to help golfers improve their game. The service centers around personalized coaching, utilizing advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed feedback on swings. This approach is designed for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, offering structured lesson plans and practice memberships focused on measurable results and skill development.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Provides a personalized game plan with actionable feedback for improvement
Offers a comprehensive system that includes lessons, practice, and club fitting

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site bar or alcohol service mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitors used for data-driven fitting and swing analysis.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides clubs and fitting services to help you find the perfect match for your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drinks are permitted, as GOLFTEC focuses on a professional training environment without on-site concessions.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC is primarily a training and practice facility, not a simulator for playing full 18-hole rounds. Sessions are focused on skill development rather than course play.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, making it suitable for young golfers to learn and improve their skills with expert coaching.
